title: Defender Pro-TEC Key Safe - Police Preferred Specification - Wall Mounted Outdoor Key Lock Box - Push Button Combination Key Cabinet Waterproof Cover - Fits Up To 10 Keys - Police Accredited
features: PRO-TEC KEY SAFE - A highly secure, heavy-duty metal outdoor key storage box featuring 12 easy-press push buttons and an ergonomic turn dial. Allows up to 4,000 possible combinations to be used.

DURABLE DESIGN - The strong metal body demonstrates durability also featuring a weatherproof rubber cover to disguise and protect the unit. Tested and certified for external masonry walls, the perfect solution for a reliable, quick installation key safe.

LARGE CAPACITY - A compact and discreet design which takes up minimal space while offering a generous internal capacity to store up to 10 keys which features an internal hook to hang keys onto safely.

SIMPLE TO USE - Installing a key safe has many benefits and can make your life a lot more convenient. Suitable for care workers, kids, cleaners, holiday lets, airbnbs, handymen, workplaces and many more.

POLICE ACCREDITED - The Pro-TEC is one of the very few Police Preferred Key Safes in the UK and comes at an unbeatable price. Attack tested to LPS 1175: Issue 8, achieving Police Preferred Secured By Design Specification.
description: Product Description What's in the box: 1 x Defender Pro-TEC Key Safe 1 x TPU Cover 4 x Thunderbolts 1 x Combination Protection Card 1 x Combination Setting Key 1 x Instruction Sheet IMPORTANT! Please read the following instructions carefully before installing your key safe. Always wear goggles or other suitable eye protection before starting to drill. Defender Pro-TEC Key Safe Police Accredited Heavy Duty Outdoor Key Storage The Defender Pro-TEC is a heavy-duty steel key safe. The Pro-Tec is also attack tested to LPS 1175 Issue 8. With 12 easy-press push buttons, this allows up to 4,000 possible combinations. The combination code used is recommended to be anywhere between 4 and 6 digits, for maximum security. The weatherproof rubber cover features a handy drilling template, including ready-made guide holes allowing marking up without holding the heavy safe. Holds Up To 10 Keys Ergonomic Turn Dial Opening Heavy Duty Steel Police Accredited European Product Design Award 2023 YOUR KEY SAFE On the front of the key safe there are 12 buttons, numbers 1-0, plus letters A-B. There is also an ‘Open’ turn dial and a red ‘Clear’ catch. The key safe is shipped from the factory without a pre-set combination. This means that the ‘Open’ turn dial will open the key safe without any number buttons being pressed. BEFORE INSTALLING THE KEY SAFE Select your own combination for the key safe. As with all mechanical key safes, each number in a combination can only be used once. It is recommended that you do not use a number combination that can be easily guessed. Do not use a bank card PIN number as this may breach your financial security should someone determine the combination to your key safe. Use a unique number that only you will know between four and six numbers inclusive. Record it on the Combination Protector Card included; this should be safely stored so that in the unlikely event that you forget your combination it can be located and used to access your keys. SETTING YOUR COMBINATION STEP 1 To set the combination for the first time, slide the Clear catch down to clear the memory and reset the number buttons. Rotate the Open dial button 90° clockwise and pull open the lid. The top of the key safe is conveniently hinged, take care so that the key safe door doesn’t close on your fingers. Whilst open, rotate the turn dial 90° anti-clockwise back to it’s original position. STEP 2 There are 12 metal dials, numbered 1-0 plus A-B, with red arrow indicators on the inner door. There is no pre-set combination so all the red arrows should be facing towards the word RESET. NOTE: these numbers correspond to the numbered buttons on the front of the lid. STEP 3 Using the Combination Setting Key provided, set each digit of your combination. To do this, simply place the Combination Setting Key into the metal dial, apply light pressure and rotate 180°. The red arrow should now be facing towards the word SET. Repeat for each number in your combination. Take care to line up each red arrow in the correct direction - 90° turn will not work. STEP 4 Reattach the plastic cover, inserting and tightening the screw. DO NOT CLOSE THE KEY SAFE DOOR UNTIL YOU HAVE TESTED THE COMBINATION!
